## Report Analysis Commands

To view report contents:

```bash
# View daily learning report
type storage\reports\angel_daily_learning_report_20251129.txt

# View daily quick summary
type storage\reports\daily_quick_summary_20251129.txt

# View real learning summary (CSV)
type storage\reports\real_learning_summary_20251129.csv
```

---

## Report Generation Commands

To regenerate or create new reports:

```bash
# Daily learning digest
python -m core.engine.angel_daily_learning_digest

# Daily auto reports
python -m core.engine.angel_daily_auto_reports

# Weekly summary
python -m core.engine.angel_weekly_summary_report

# Rolling dashboard
python -m core.engine.angel_rolling_learning_dashboard
```
